name: jluo41-tools
description: Personal Claude Code skill plugins for LogSeq, haipipe pipeline, email chronicle, and visual artifacts/diagrams

plugins.name: logseq
plugins.description: Claude Skills for LogSeq - block-based markdown, Datalog queries, templates, whiteboards, and session logging

plugins.name: haipipe
plugins.description: Claude Skills for the haipipe pipeline - per-subject data contract (stages 0-2), project-wide data pipeline (1-4), NN models (5), endpoints (6), and project scaffolding

plugins.name: chronicle
plugins.description: Claude Skills for Email Chronicle - index emails from MS365 Outlook into organized markdown

plugins.name: diagram-skill
plugins.description: Claude Skills for visual artifacts and reports - ASCII diagrams, draw.io, Excalidraw, and image-heavy Markdown progress logs
